position.arbitration_reason: V13 zone-distribution rescue selected winger from repeated wide/high-wide average positions.
position.heatmap_position_note: Visual heatmap only. Tactical position is intentionally not estimated here; use Position_Arbitrator output.

heatmap_visual_summary.note: Visual/action-density summary only. Do not use this as a tactical position estimate; use Position_Arbitrator output for position.

role.measured_inputs: dribbles_attempted_per90, progressive_carries_per90, shots_total_per90, xg_per90, key_passes_per90, xa_per90

visual_summary.note: Visual/action-density summary only. Do not use this as a tactical position estimate; use Position_Arbitrator output for position.

heatmap.position_note: Visual heatmap only. Tactical position is intentionally not estimated here; use Position_Arbitrator output.

actions.note: Action rows are normalized for Observable maps. Use points_by_category for layered pass/carry/dribble/defensive plots.

summary.headline: Antonio Nusa profiles as a AM-W with strongest value in dribbles won/90, progressive carries/90.
summary.one_liner: Antonio Nusa: Inside Winger profile with A- progression and A defensive indicators with 1,146 mapped non-shot actions.
summary.model_caveat: Role, similarity, and position labels are model outputs. Season average-position distribution is the primary spatial source; heatmaps and actions are visual/action-density layers only.
